attacking_style: Excels at perfectly timed late attacks (3-4km to go) on rolling/selective terrain, often capitalizing on hesitation or after sustained tempo has reduced groups. Shows opportunistic instincts rather than long-range moves.
team_tactics: Operates with minimal leadout support, relying on individual positioning and tactical awareness rather than structured team setups. Benefits when other teams (INEOS, Jumbo) control pace through tempo grinding.
terrain_preference: Rolling circuits and selective finishes that eliminate pure sprinters but don't require sustained climbing. Monument-level one-day parcours suit him better than mountain stages. Exposed on pure GC mountain efforts.
vulnerability: Requires reduced bunch scenarios created by others' work; less effective when forced to control races himself. Limited effectiveness against pure climbers on extended ascents or pure sprinters with intact trains.
key_patterns: Attacks in final 3-4km after tempo grinding reduces groups (Catalunya 3.5km, following patterns)
Excels following stronger climbers' moves then out-positioning them in finale (Roglič move, Lombardia chase)
Performs best when GC teams/others police race, allowing opportunistic positioning (Dauphiné, Catalunya INEOS tempo)
Monument/one-day capacity demonstrated without team leadership burden (Lombardia 2nd, Catalunya win)
Can finish fast from reduced groups without leadout support (Vuelta sprint second)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Lombardia podium from chase group shows sustained Monument-level capacity, building on 2022 Catalunya win and aggressive stage racing
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
